data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes choices to streamline decision-making in navigating the application.
data.technical_spec: Design focuses on simplifying user interactions and quick access to content.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates an appealing design to enhance user satisfaction and perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Focuses on a clean, visually pleasing interface with intuitive controls.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Applies sizing and positioning that allows users to easily interact with buttons and controls.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas for frequently used controls, improved navigation efficiency.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Ensures familiarity by using patterns common to similar services.
data.technical_spec: Aligns design choices with user expectations derived from similar platforms.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to improve user understanding and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of playlist options and controls for intuitive accessibility.
